testcase.name: As a user visiting the Pet Clinic website › As a visitor, I want to see the welcome page, so that I can understand what the application is about

failure.message: welcome.spec.ts:6:7 As a visitor, I want to see the welcome page, so that I can understand what the application is about

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: As a user visiting the Pet Clinic website › As a visitor, I want to see the error page when something goes wrong, so that I get helpful feedback
